cases.description: Fund/company/round/planning-FMV authority including split parents, missing round parent, post-as-of active round behavior, and same-name fund isolation.
assertions: same-name companies remain fund-scoped
multiple parent investments retain investment IDs
missing-round parent contributes zero round-derived amount
post-as-of active round remains selected by current behavior
future and superseded planning FMV marks are excluded from current facts
approved non-USD planning FMV marks block company actuals
knownLimitations: current active round selection is not date-filtered by asOfDate
investment and lot vehicle attribution is unavailable_by_schema

cases.description: Financial facts cash-flow, marks, period-NAV, vehicle roster, and empty future-contract arrays.
assertions: portfolio_investment cash-flow points are separate from ActualMetrics deployed capital
accepted cash-flow corrections and reversals follow current R35 semantics
valuation marks compose period NAV without ownership multiplication
vehicle-null target-fund valuation marks remain executable in period NAV
observation and future selection arrays stay empty
knownLimitations: economics consumer is blocked by unattributed legacy direct evidence
investment and lot vehicle attribution is unavailable_by_schema

cases.description: ActualMetrics legacy totalDeployed and ownership fallback position FMV.
assertions: totalDeployed comes from investment rows plus company fallback
positive ownership scales current valuation
null and zero ownership preserve full legacy valuation
IRR is intentionally omitted from the golden contract
knownLimitations: ActualMetrics deployed capital is a separate legacy surface from financial-facts cash-flow points

cases.description: Portfolio overview per-company and aggregate ownership fallback FMV.
assertions: positive ownership scales current valuation
null and zero ownership preserve full legacy valuation
portfolio aggregates match current Decimal service math
knownLimitations: portfolio overview consumes portfolio-company rows, not lots

cases.description: Financial facts cash-flow fragment for later split-surface comparisons.
assertions: portfolio_investment points are represented as accepted cash-flow facts
competing eligible perspectives choose the current perspective precedence
reversed-status cash-flow rows are excluded
totals contain LP contribution/distribution fields but no deployedCapital field
knownLimitations: cash-flow vehicle IDs do not imply lot or investment vehicle attribution

cases.description: Financial facts valuation mark fragment including period NAV.
assertions: accepted marks are position-level fair values
target-fund vehicle-null marks are retained
period NAV carries stale marks forward under current selection semantics
knownLimitations: financial facts marks are not multiplied by ownership

cases.description: ActualMetrics selected NAV surface for ownership fallback.
assertions: positive ownership scales valuation
null and zero ownership keep full valuation
knownLimitations: company-level position FMV is not vehicle-attributed

cases.description: PortfolioOverview selected company FMV surface for ownership fallback.
assertions: per-company currentValue matches ownership fallback semantics
knownLimitations: portfolio overview does not consume lots

cases.description: LotService.list ordering, pagination, and stored cents from deterministic seeded rows.
assertions: lots order by createdAt descending then UUID descending
costBasisCents remain stored cents
lots are not consumed by facts services
knownLimitations: investment lot vehicle attribution is unavailable_by_schema
